title: Forestry
body:
# Forestry

Forestry deals with farming, renewable energy production as well as the breeding of trees, bees and butterflies in Minecraft.

Notable features
- Automatic Farms
- Bee breeding
- Tree breeding
- Butterflies
- Intelligent Backpacks
- Mail System
- Energy Production
- MultiFarm Orchard

Further information and news can be found on the [official wiki](https://forestryforminecraft.info/) (it's currently down due to COVID) or the [official Discord server](https://discord.gg/49XNRJk)

---

### Addons

- Binnie's Mods (Extra Bees, Extra Trees)
- Magic Bees
- Gendustry
